overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy nighttime exploration of a futuristic waterfront. The player walks through a paved plaza and along an illuminated wooden pier before jumping into the water and swimming beneath the surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront plaza with curved glass architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the paved plaza toward the waterfront

entered.detail: large modern building with illuminated windows and curved facade
towering skyscraper rising behind the curved building
wide concrete plaza with yellow painted markings
tall modern street lamp with bright white light
tall structure visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy night in a futuristic urban plaza. The camera moves forward across paved ground toward a waterfront, with a massive curved glass building dominating the right side and a tall skyscraper visible behind it. A street lamp illuminates the left side of the path while a mysterious tower looms in the foggy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated wooden pier extending over dark water

events.description: transitions from concrete plaza onto wooden pier structure
descends ramp leading down to the main pier deck

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier past cargo containers and overhead lights, heading toward the water's edge

entered.detail: wooden dock structure with metal railings extending over the water
metal safety railings along both sides of the pier
warm yellow lights mounted along the pier railings
stacked crates and containers on the pier deck
yellow metal ladder at the end of the pier leading into water

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open plaza onto a narrow wooden pier that extends over dark water. The path is lined with metal railings and warm lights, passing cargo containers and equipment. The curved glass building recedes into the background on the right while the foggy tower becomes more centered in the view ahead.

events.description: jumps from the end of the pier into the water
submerges completely underwater with limited visibility and refracted light

agents.ego_description: falling into the water and swimming forward underwater beneath the pier structure

entered.detail: murky dark water surrounding the camera with light filtering from above

segments.scene_description: The camera plunges into the water from the pier, transitioning to an underwater perspective. The wooden structure of the pier disappears above as the view becomes dominated by dark water with shimmering light reflections from the surface. Visibility is limited in the murky depths as the camera swims forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: water surface near dock with illuminated city skyline

events.description: resurfaces from underwater to the water surface

agents.ego_description: floating at the water surface and looking back at the illuminated city buildings and pier

entered.detail: silver metal bollard rising from the water near the dock
large illuminated advertisement screen on the building facade
edge of the wooden pier visible at water level

segments.scene_description: The camera breaks the surface of the water, revealing a view of the city from the waterline. A metal bollard post stands nearby while the curved glass building and surrounding skyscrapers are visible again, now with a bright neon billboard illuminated on the right. The wooden dock edge is visible in the foreground as the camera floats and observes the city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a foggy urban plaza, moving across a pier and beneath the water's surface before returning to the city's waterline. It begins by gliding across paved ground toward a waterfront, passing a massive curved glass building and a distant, mysterious tower shrouded in mist. As the camera leaves the plaza, the environment shifts onto a narrow wooden pier lined with warm lights and cargo containers, bringing the foggy tower into central focus. The perspective then plunges abruptly into the dark, murky depths, where the pier vanishes above and the view is dominated by shimmering light reflections. Finally, the camera breaks the surface to reveal the city from the waterline, floating beside a metal bollard as a bright neon billboard illuminates the surrounding skyscrapers.
